review_title: A good program when you are looking to get videos quickly
description: My experience is very good and I will continue to use this program because it has gotten me out of a lot of trouble. Thanks to it I can create videos for social networks quickly.
author: Sandra Alicia M.
pros: It is an application that I have used several times to my satisfaction. The use I give it is to create videos quickly. These videos are perfect for use on social networks. In particular, I really like to use them in Instagram Stories and Reels. One feature I love about this program is that with it you get good results with almost no video editing. It's very useful when you're busy and need to have a quick video. The animations that the program generates with the images are very nice and suitable for my use.
cons: I would like to be able to select the music for a video before it is generated, or to be able to make changes to it afterwards. I have also found that the program sometimes crashes a bit when viewing the results. That is, when the videos are already generated and you try to see the results. You press play on one of them. Then, you stop it to watch the other videos. The problem is that many times the sound does not stop and you hear the sound of two videos, which is annoying, you have to remove the sound from the computer.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Why Bool is My Go-To Video Editing Tool
description: Really give me a creative buddy and makes some design or production takes faster
author: Gregg L. W.
pros: ### Pros of the Bool Video AI Tool 1. **User-Friendly Interface**: Bool's intuitive design makes it easy for beginners to navigate and use effectively. 2. **Advanced AI Features**: The AI-driven features streamline the editing process, saving time and effort. 3. **High-Quality Output**: Bool consistently produces professional-grade video quality, suitable for various platforms. 4. **Customization Options**: Offers a wide range of templates and effects, allowing for creative and personalized video projects. 5. **Efficient Performance**: Fast processing speeds ensure quick rendering and exporting of videos. 6. **Seamless Integration**: Easily integrates with other tools and platforms, enhancing its utility and convenience for users.
cons: Still needs to get smarter and more creatuve
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A perfect platform for creating quality videos
description: My experience with this program is fantastic. I must say that, although I have other video editing programs, the one I really use to make videos that I later upload to my social networks is this one. If it is the one I always use it is because of its quality and fantastic results in a very short time.
author: Sandra M.
pros: I must say that I love Boolvideo. I started using the inferior program, which is Boolvideo Lite, and then I realized about the advantages of this platform. So, a few months later, I started using Boolvideo. Regarding Boolvideo, I must say that I love the ease and speed with which the program creates videos for social networks. Boolvideo has a multitude of templates that you can adapt to your needs. I love the templates and I always find one that I like. In my case, I insert several images of my products and Boolvideo generates great quality videos. The results are fantastic and the best thing is that there are some customization options. Also, the Boolvideo team is very focused on improving the program. For example, they have recently added the option to add videos as well as images. I must say that I haven't tried this feature yet, but the fact that they have created it seems fantastic to me. I usually use the Template option, which gives fantastic results. But, in addition, the program also has the AI Video Creator option, which uses AI to create the videos, and the Editor option.
cons: For me, the big problem with this app is that it still doesn't have the 16:9 ratio horizontal videos. I hope the Boolvideo team, which seems to be very involved with the product, will focus on offering this option within the customizable templates.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: When Video Creation Is Made Easy
description: Overall, this has been a great learning experience and they seem to constantly improve their offering. service and features. We can create a host of marketing videos, educational, sales, and promos, and the software can customize the video for the various social media formats with ease.
author: robert R.
pros: Boolvideo has a tremendous amount of templates which makes getting a video created much faster and allows for various iterations without wasting time or overthinking. As an AI-curious consumer and video marketer, Boolvideo is allowing me to use AI in my video creations and have some very interesting and persuasive content. In addition, the initial start price of $3 for three months of video creation and access to the needed software and features such as AI image recognition and GPT-4 at that price to learn is outstanding.
cons: As a newbie to AI video creation technology, I wish there were more tutorials, prompts, and documentation on how to get the most out of the video creation. In addition, full access to the templates is on the higher tier so we feel more compelled to invest more than we need at the moment but at least the product pays for itself with one sale of our products.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good tool with a lot of AI fonctions
description: My overall experience with Boolvideo has been positive. I find the platform easy to navigate and was impressed with the high quality of the videos. There's a good variety of content, so I almost always find something interesting to watch. Although I haven’t had much need to contact customer support, the few times I did, they were helpful and quick to respond

review_title: Great Platform If You Can Afford It
description: I had a great experience but the price point made it completely unapproachable and I didn't want to get used to it. 30$ a month is just simply way too much. Half that and maybe I'd think about biting. It also blew my mind that for that much of a cost you don't even have unlimited creations. 30$ a month is the basic tier. Huge turn off unfortunately. Otherwise, great product.
author: Jarret A.
pros: Boolvideo is excellent compared to its competitors. It's seamlessly integrated with all of it's functions and does exactly what it's supposed to do. It's even surprising how well it works. There's also a ton of options you wouldn't expect, for making your life simpler and your editing and video creation tasks faster. I used it for putting video to audio clips I have from my show. It turned a tedious task into a quick and easy one.
cons: The price is way out of my wheelhouse. 30$ a month is triple what I pay for any other service for any product. I would love to have to the product but it's not approachable for me. A small creator like myself makes less than 30$ a month in revenue from my content. This would put me way in the hole
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Comprehensive and User-Friendly Video Editing Tool
author: christopher F.
pros: What I liked most about Boolvideo was its intuitive interface, making it accessible even for beginners. The range of editing features is impressive, from basic trimming to advanced effects and transitions. The real-time preview function is incredibly useful, allowing you to see changes instantly. Additionally, the cloud storage integration ensures that your projects are always backed up and accessible from any device.
cons: The least appealing aspect of Boolvideo is its rendering speed, which can be quite slow, especially for high-resolution videos. Some advanced features are locked behind a paywall, which might be a drawback for users looking for free options. Additionally, occasional bugs and crashes can interrupt the editing process, necessitating frequent saves to avoid losing work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer

cons: My experience from 2-3 months ago (early 2024) was as follows: The trial wasn't really a trial at all. I could barely test anything due to the limitations of having a trial account, but that wasn't the main issue. What I dislike is when SaaS trials automatically convert into paid plans. The app should be compelling enough for me to subscribe on my own. However, a deal breaker for me is when it's more difficult than completing my PhD to find the option to cancel the trial. That is a major no-no.

description: I used Boolvideo for my basic reels and posts; it was easy to use, and there are options for stickers, voiceovers, filters, and music.
